name: Warhammer 40,000 RPG - Imperial Fists
description:
FORTIFY

high guys so I'm back. Imperial fists are my favorite of the legions so I made them.

Experimenting with multiple openings. Option 1 has you in space getting ready, option 2 has you in a fortified town.

I recommend DeepSeek for this, specifically V3.

'Graphic gore' my ass, fix your detector. It was a picture of a yellow plastic mini.

Probably will try using scripts to make this thing better soon.
creator: TheAbsoluteWorst
